## Summary

One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why.

## Kind

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci / build
- [ ] perf
- [ ] chore

## Surface

- [ ] Anchor program (on-chain)
- [ ] TypeScript SDK (public API)
- [ ] Python CLI (public API)
- [ ] Internal / tooling only

## Test plan

- [ ] `anchor build` passes
- [ ] `anchor test` passes locally
- [ ] `yarn workspace @ghos/sdk test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests exercise the new code path
- [ ] Manually tested on devnet (paste tx signature)

## Breaking change?

- [ ] yes
- [ ] no

If yes, explain the migration path.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` and `yarn format` have been run
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] docs/ updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] No secrets, devnet keypairs, or RPC tokens committed
